Hey, Bob, I'm looking at what Jack was talking about, and, uh
It's definitely not a particle that's nearby
It is a bright object, and it's obviously rotating
Because it's flashing
It's way out in the distance
Certainly rotating in a very rhythmic fashion
Because the flashes come around almost on time
As we look back at the Earth it's up at about 11 o'clock
About, uh, well, maybe ten or 12 diameters- diameters, uh
I don't know whether that does you any good
But there's something out there
